risks: The registry is deliberately coarse-grained; future metrics must be explicitly registered before they can participate in precise impact analysis.
Interconnection remains blocked until its economic-event adapter exists; the blocked hash is not evidence that interconnection lineage is ready.
The SQLite observer was verified against an empty isolated canonical schema only; it does not accept the private production database or any financial result.
Visible UI, long-job trace propagation and the failure matrix remain Phase 10.3 and whole-stage gates.
rollback: Revert the Phase 10.2 evidence/governance commit and then product commit a64f3b51576ebe507bd65b3f5b54c5b2a3b74c41. No database or persistent-cache rollback is required because the canonical private database was not read or changed and the cache remains non-persistent.
